reviews.text: I had a bad tooth problem and went to a GP dentist think my RCT could be done but after 7 painful visits I was still having pain. Did some  x-rays and found out that tooth is cracked and need to extract it. So i went online to look for dentist but because it was cracked and broken it was complicated they told me I must go to specialist!  I checked online and a first few were reluctant to do and when I contacted this clinic Tropicana Dental the nurse passed me to Dr. M and he explained to me everything so nicely and was confident and I straight away went there.  Needless to say the surgery went well, he was very gentle and all my fears went away.  He made it seem so easy. And now just 2 days after no need to take painkillers.  Thank you Tropicana Dental for the wisdom tooth surgery.  In case anyone has problem with wisdom tooth I recommend better come to this clinic.   Save your money and trauma too.

reviews.name: Amanda Lee
reviews.text: Dr Muruga was awesome. 30 mins in and out of wisdom tooth surgery. Definitely was in good hands of a skilled doctor. Recovery process was less painful than expected too. Thank you!

reviews.text: My first time visiting this clinic. I almost drove past it to go home. Wanted to change my mind cause I have this fear about dentists. Dr. Muruga help me overcome my initial fear. A long way to go but I was very comfortable and at ease for my first appointment.

reviews.name: Gogeta Gone
reviews.text: Had an issue with my upper wisdom tooth. Contacted the number provided and reached Marian who was trying to arrange an available time but the doctor was occupied so I was given his number instead. Texted him and he immediately called to do a phone consultation. Once his schedule was free, he sent me a message to fix an appointment. Two days later, I travelled over 40 minutes to meet Dr. Muruga, worth my time definitely. Both Marian and the doctor definitely makes us feel welcomed. Calm, friendly and experienced. On top of that Dr.Muruga's a psychologist too. He'll make sure you're calm. Had my removal done quite swiftly and recovery is looking good so far. Great experience, overall.

reviews.name: Rishibha Chadha
reviews.text:
I set up an appointment for my dad with Dr Muruga after reading all the positive reviews and truly was not disappointed. My dad is one of those hates going to the doctor/will let a problem get pretty bad before he finally goes. Similarly for his teeth, he had some pretty bad staining and some recurring issues. I have never ever seen my dad come back so happy from a dentist appointment! Dr Muruga was friendly, calm and extremely patient during the consultation and did a fantastic job removing most of the straining, diagnosing some issues and setting up a treatment plan. Even his staff was thoroughly professional from communicating over WhatsApp to give directions to the office etc.
Thanks again Dr Muruga!!!

reviews.name: Monicelson
reviews.text:
I visited this Dental Surgery whilst in Kuala Lumpur.
I needed a check on fillings I recently had done in Bali, and for discussion on having bridges.
Dr Mahendran Ponnudurai (he is the president of the Malaysian Dental Association) is the first dentist who clearly explained everything that needed to be done, why it was necessary (this was explained with various models of teeth, pictures and x-rays) and what could happen if  I left my teeth in their current condition.
His explanation was clear, succinct, factual and humorous. He could clearly see that I was fearful of Dental treatment, but his manner, knowledge and professionalism calmed me.
His two Dental nurses were also excellent, in my opinion this is a superb team.
I had two extractions, a root canal, treatment for an abscess, two permanent bridges fitted and two temporary bridges.
I will return to Malaysia in June for the temporary bridges removal and the fitting of 2 permanent bridges.
I am incredibly happy with the work Dr Mahendran has done so far (I am finally able to chew properly again), I can fully and confidently recommend him (especially for people like myself who have a fear of dentists).
His surgery is open from early till late six days a week.
Thank you for your time and Patience Dr Mahendran, it was a pleasure getting to know you.
A quick update to my original review.
It is now May 2025 and I am back in Malaysia. I visited Dr Mahendran again,  this time I needed caps as some of my teeth had some serious cracks.
The service I received was every bit as good as my first visit.
He knows my pain tolerance is low, so made sure I did not feel any pain, even numbing the injection site with cream, before giving me the injection.
He prepared the teeth, took a mould and put a cover on the teeth.
Once my new caps arrived, he numbed the site before removing the cover.
New caps were fitted quickly and securely, without pain.
He checks his work every couple of days and makes subtle adjustments if and where needed.
I find Dr Mahendran to be a genuinely nice and professional man. His sense of humour always makes the trip pleasant and the work is excellent.
If you're worried about your teeth, this is where you should come to.

We went in for emergency crown replacement. The only place opened at night so we went there. Instead of doing the crown replacement, she talked for 1 hour about the different treatments she can do for us and charged us RM150 consultation. Dr Lavina is a manipulative seller. She will plant these treatments into your head and make it seem like you THINK you need to do them. Do not go here if you want to be scammed.

reviews.text:
If you're considering braces, Damansara Dental Studio, is absolutely wonderful from start to finish.

I had my braces done here and honestly, the entire 1 year journey was nothing short of amazing. Before coming to DDS, I had enquired at several other clinics and was told it would take at least 3 years. Dr. Lavina and the team somehow made it happen in just 1 year, I still can't believe it! The results speak for themselves and I couldn't be happier with my smile.

What truly sets this clinic apart is how warm and welcoming everyone is the moment you walk through the door. From the very first consultation, I felt completely at ease, like I was being taken care of by family. The team never made me feel rushed or anxious. They walked me through every single step of the process, explaining what they were doing and what to expect next, which made such a huge difference.

Throughout the entire year, every appointment was smooth, comfortable, and thorough. Dr. Lavina's attention to detail and genuine care for her patients is something I have never experienced at any other clinic. The small gestures, the reassuring words, the patience in answering every question I had, the warm smiles made every visit something I actually looked forward to.

The clinic itself is clean, modern, and has such a calming atmosphere. You never feel like you're just another patient here. You feel seen, heard, and genuinely cared for.

Thank you so much Dr. Lavina and the entire DDS team for this incredible journey. You gave me more than just a beautiful smile, you gave me confidence. Truly the best dental experience I have ever had! 🥰🌹

reviews.name: Ema Sense
reviews.text:
Overall, the experience was good. Dr. Choo is very patient and takes the time to explain things in detail.

Follow up review:
I am updating my previous review because my experience with the payment process and customer service has been consistently disappointing.

Previously, I was encouraged to leave a review in exchange for an RM50 voucher that could be used on a future payment. I left the review and received the voucher. However, during my visit today, after making payment, I presented the voucher only a few seconds after tapping my card. The staff refused to honor it and told me to use it on my next visit instead.

The reason given was that the payment had already been processed. While I understand there may be procedures in place, the delay was literally a matter of seconds. Considering that I have spent thousands of ringgit on treatments here, I found the response unnecessarily rigid and lacking any effort to accommodate a loyal customer. There were many possible solutions, such as reversing the transaction or issuing a refund adjustment, but none were even considered.

What disappointed me most is that this is not the first time I have encountered something similar.

On a previous occasion, I came for a consultation and later decided to proceed with treatment. During my first treatment appointment, I noticed a promotion for new customers displayed at the counter. I had never been informed about it. When I enquired, I was told that I was not eligible because I had visited before. However, my earlier visit was merely a free consultation—I had not yet engaged any paid services. Despite this, the promotion was denied and I was charged the full amount.

At the time, I let it go. However, after experiencing another rigid rejection today, I felt compelled to share my feedback. The issue is not the RM50. The issue is the attitude towards customers. When a customer has spent a significant amount of money with a clinic, a few seconds' delay in presenting a voucher should not be treated as a reason to deny it outright. Good customer service requires discretion, flexibility, and a willingness to help, not simply hiding behind procedures.

To be clear, my previous positive review of the dentist still stands. The doctor has been professional and competent throughout the treatment. Unfortunately, the same cannot be said for the clinic's payment process and customer service. For a clinic that charges these prices, I expected a much higher standard of customer care and flexibility. Instead, I left feeling that customer loyalty is taken for granted and that providing a positive customer experience is not a priority.

reviews.name: Meryem Kuzu
reviews.text:
I visited this dental clinic for the first time after not having a check-up in about two years here in Malaysia. It was recommended by a colleague and conveniently located near me. I had been dealing with a toothache and gum inflammation for the past three days, which even triggered a migraine, so I was honestly a bit anxious going in.

Dr. Ju Lyn was excellent throughout the entire visit. She took the time to clearly explain my tooth condition, walked me through the X-ray results, and outlined what I should address and other suggestions. I really appreciated how thorough and reassuring she was.

I ended up getting a general check-up, X-ray, and filling done, and the whole process was smooth and completely painless. She was very knowledgeable, attentive, and made me feel at ease the entire time.

Overall, a very positive experience from booking to the overall procedure - I’ll definitely be coming back.

reviews.name: Kit Shaun
reviews.text:
Great experience at this clinic, so much so that I genuinely felt compelled to share it. From the moment I walked in, Prema at the front desk set the tone, being incredibly warm, friendly, and welcoming. It’s rare to feel so at ease in a dental setting, but she made the entire registration process smooth and pleasant.

Dr Julynn was exceptional. She was detailed, patient, and meticulous every step of the way, from taking the time to explain everything for my layman brain to understand, to making sure I was comfortable throughout. What stood out the most was how thorough she was, you can tell she genuinely cares about her patients and takes pride in her work. I never felt rushed, and every concern I had was addressed.

Overall, this clinic exceeded my expectations in every way. Professional, caring, and genuinely dedicated to patient comfort, I couldn’t recommend them more highly!

Dr. Ting Ann Nee was an excellent dentist to me. She has been my dentist since 2016 from Damon braces to now root canal.

I kept returning to her even though I lived further away because she was trustworthy, patience, understanding and very kind. She always gave good professional advice, not forcing to earn extra but really care for us and advice based on our perspective to let us decide freely.

Before my root canal treatment, I was terrified and anxious but Dr Ting took her time to patiently explain the whole process and calmed me, which I highly appreciate her thoughtful gesture. During the crowning process, she was never in a rush. She was testing and polishing back and forth then readjust, ensuring the perfect ceramic fit plus looking balance just so we can have a great looking smile.

In addition, Ting Dental is always upgrading their technology and service, which showed that they are eager to stay up to date and providing better and more comfortable dental service to their customers.

I highly recommended to visit them if you need a dental service, adults or kids, they'll take good care of us without breaking the wallet.

reviews.name: Darick Cheong
reviews.text: Today brought my 9 year old daughter here for teeth removal. I am impressed with the level of attention from the doctor and nurses towards my daughter and made the whole process seamless and smooth for my daughter. This dental clinic is highly recommended. Happy daughter happy dad !!

reviews.name: Steven Ong
reviews.text:
Our experience at Little Gigi has been nothing short of amazing. Environment is kids friendly with adequate books/toys etc to keep children occupied while waiting.

Dr Kuan was our attending dentist and she has been amazing with her work. She is careful and attentive in assuring my son’s concerns are met and explained in details to prevent my son from fearing dental visits.

Overall it was a great experience for both my wife and I as well as for my son.

reviews.name: Tirath K
reviews.text: I would give it 6 stars if I could. I'm an adult terrified of dentist visits and always dread them, as much as I initially dreaded this one too. I told Dr. Kuan of my fears beforehand and she was very patient, calm and reassuring throughout the session. She handled me with utmost care and kept me composed the whole time. She stopped each time I needed a break and never once rushed me, making sure I was comfortable. I am so grateful for the way I was taken care of by Dr. Kuan and all the nurses present. Thank you, team Little Gigi BU!

reviews.name: nih tang
reviews.text: I has great experience at here. Dr Kuan is ver kind, friendly and patient with my kids.

reviews.name: ain asyaqireen
reviews.text: Had a scaling and filling treatment today at this clinic, and it was surely a great experience. Dr. Kuan was professional in explaining the conditions of my teeth, and all the staff were very friendly. The clinic is also clean and comfortable, highly recommend to go here for your routine dental check ups !! 🫪🧸

reviews.name: Fatin Athirah
reviews.text:
I recently came across this newly opened dental clinic in our neighborhood for my child's regular check-up. Since we just relocated to the area, this was our first visit, and we loved it!

My child was seen by Dr. Terry, and he was fantastic! He was so patient, taking the time to explain her dental condition to my tired weekend brain using some very cool, high-tech gadgets. We opted for the premium package, which even included a lovely gift set! Although it was a bit on the pricier side, the overall experience made it well worth it!

reviews.name: heidi tan
reviews.text:
Dr. Kuan was kind, friendly, and very patient with young children. She made my child feel comfortable throughout the visit and handled everything with great care. The clinic also has a comfortable and welcoming environment, making the overall experience pleasant and stress-free.

Even if you have older children, there is no need to worry as they can keep themselves entertained with the video games provided while waiting. A thoughtful touch that makes visits much more enjoyable for the whole family.

The nurses were also warm, attentive, and professional. They were patient in assisting throughout the visit and helped create a reassuring experience from start to finish.

reviews.text: Had a chipped filling which was lodged between my gums and molar causing nerve impingement. Doc helped remove and fixed the filling relieving me of the week-long pain. Happy with the booking process and overall service. Will come back for other dental needs soon!

reviews.text:
1st time at this clinic owned my Malay dentist. He is so gentle. Usually I’m scared of the numbing injection at the dentist, but this dentist did it so gently I almost didn’t feel anything.
The price was quite reasonable — mine was RM270 for filling a large cavity.
Highly recommended

reviews.name: zety hussain
reviews.text: There are two types of doctors: the first is the lazy and rough type, while the second is passionate and sincere about their work. Dr. Fawwaz belongs to the second category. He truly enjoys his job and is very friendly. He even sings while working, which helped ease my nervousness. He is very gentle in his work, and it didn’t hurt at all. He listened carefully to the issues with my teeth and delivered excellent treatment. I am very happy with the results of his work. Highly recommended clinic, and I will definitely come back again.

reviews.name: Jess Leow
reviews.text:
Took my girl for an extraction and Dr F was super good. He assured her and watermelon gel did the magic 🫢… wasn’t scheduled for my teeth cleaning but after watching him, I decided to just do it 🤣! It was one of the most comfortable and almost painless scaling ever did in 2 years 🤭👍🏻.
All the best, Dr F.

reviews.text: went to FF Dental to do tooth extraction. it was my first time cabut gigi dewasa actually and the process went well! 😄 Dr Fawwaz did explained on the options, precautions and what do and donts.
